items.label: Remove Verification Hub Post
items.description: Removes this verification post from the subreddit.

play_latest_release_version.label: Latest release version
play_latest_release_version.helpText: Set this after publishing a new VouchX release so older installations can show an in-app update notice to moderators.

play_latest_release_title.label: Latest release title
play_latest_release_title.helpText: Optional short heading shown in the moderator panel update notice.

play_latest_release_notes.label: Latest release notes
play_latest_release_notes.helpText: Optional short summary shown to moderators when an update is available.

play_latest_release_link.label: Latest release link
play_latest_release_link.helpText: Optional changelog or help URL shown in the moderator panel update notice.

play_latest_release_severity.label: Latest release severity
play_latest_release_severity.helpText: Set to "critical" to force repeated reminders, or "normal" for the standard 7-day dismissal behavior. Leave blank for the standard behavior.

global_blocked_usernames.label: Global blocked usernames
global_blocked_usernames.helpText: Secret comma-separated Reddit usernames blocked across every VouchX installation. This is chunk 1 of the global blocklist and is managed through the Devvit CLI.

global_blocked_usernames_chunk_count.label: Global blocked usernames chunk count
global_blocked_usernames_chunk_count.helpText: Number of active global blocklist chunks currently in use by the app-wide username restriction list.

developer_ui_usernames.label: Developer UI usernames
developer_ui_usernames.helpText: Secret comma-separated Reddit usernames allowed to view the developer-only global blocklist editor in the hub UI.

verifications_disabled_message.label: Verifications disabled message
verifications_disabled_message.helpText: Shown to users in this subreddit when submissions are turned off. If cleared, the app falls back to the built-in default message.
verifications_disabled_message.defaultValue: Verifications are temporarily disabled.  Please check back soon.

max_denials_before_block.label: Max denials before auto-block
max_denials_before_block.helpText: Users are automatically blocked in this subreddit after reaching this many denied verification submissions. Enter 0 to disable auto-block, or a whole number of 2 or greater.

auto_flair_reconcile_enabled.label: Automatically repair verification flair
auto_flair_reconcile_enabled.helpText: When enabled the app checks approved users' flair when they open the hub (no more than once every 24 hours). If the verification flair was removed or changed the app attempts to restore it. Existing flair that still matches the configured CSS class will not be replaced.

auto_archive_pending_modmail_enabled.label: Auto-archive pending verification modmail
auto_archive_pending_modmail_enabled.helpText: When enabled the app archives pending verification modmail conversations and user replies before a moderator approval or denial is made.

auto_deny_shadowbanned_enabled.label: Auto-deny shadowbanned accounts
auto_deny_shadowbanned_enabled.helpText: When enabled the app automatically denies a new verification submission if Reddit reports the account as shadowbanned. The denial counts toward the auto-block threshold and is logged as an automated action. Leave off to keep shadowbanned submissions in the queue for manual review.

multiple_approval_flairs_enabled.label: Enable multiple approval flairs
multiple_approval_flairs_enabled.helpText: When enabled, moderators can configure additional approval flair template IDs and choose one per approval in the queue.

user_advisory_score_badge_enabled.label: Show user advisory score badge
user_advisory_score_badge_enabled.helpText: When enabled, pending profile cards show the advisory score badge based on account signals. Turn off to keep account details visible without showing the score badge.

content_creator_badge_enabled.label: Show content creator badge
content_creator_badge_enabled.helpText: When enabled, pending profile cards show the content creator badge when account links match known adult creator platforms. Turn off to keep account details visible without showing the creator badge.

show_photo_instructions_before_submit.label: Show photo instructions before verification submission
show_photo_instructions_before_submit.helpText: When enabled users see the configured Photo Instructions after clicking "Submit Verification" and before uploading photos. If no instructions are configured the user proceeds directly to the acknowledgement screen and photo upload.

settings_tab_requires_config_access.label: Restrict Settings tab to mods with config/settings access
settings_tab_requires_config_access.helpText: When enabled, only moderators with config/settings access can see and use the Settings tab in the moderator panel. Review queue access is unchanged.

mod_menu_audit_purge_days.label: Purge audit log data older than (days)
mod_menu_audit_purge_days.helpText: Used by the subreddit menu action "Purge Audit Log." Enter 0 to purge all audit log entries.

deny_reason_1_label.label: Denial reason 1 label
deny_reason_1_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.

deny_reason_2_label.label: Denial reason 2 label
deny_reason_2_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.

deny_reason_4_label.helpText: Display name for this denial reason in this subreddit. Leave blank to hide the reason and its template field in the moderator panel. Maximum 48 characters.
